_comment: Species: Nine-Colored Peacock (九色孔雀) from I Shall Seal the Heavens. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Nine-Colored Peacock

canonical.appearance: Peacock 4 m tall, tail of nine-color feathers 12 m long, each feather holds a different law
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 1000 jin; ancient 12 m, 20000 jin
canonical.behavior: Divine beast; displays tail to project nine laws; cultivates by absorbing law-fragments
canonical.habitat: Law-aspected apex spirit veins, nine-color forbidden zones
canonical.relationships: Auspicious to cultivators who comprehend law
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: nine_colored_peacock — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
